description_long: This is a large, ornate book with a black, textured cover adorned with metallic gold corner protectors and a central diamond-shaped inlay. The most striking feature is a pair of sculpted metallic hands gripping the book's front cover, giving it a mysterious and possibly magical appearance. The book's pages are thick and slightly uneven, visible along the side, suggesting it is an old or valuable tome. The metallic elements have an antique, slightly tarnished finish, adding to the sense of age and importance. The cover is otherwise plain, with no visible text or illustration except for the central inlay. This book would stand out as a unique and possibly enchanted object in any urban environment.
description: A large, black book with gold metallic corners and sculpted hands gripping the cover, featuring a central diamond-shaped inlay and thick, aged pages.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the black textured surface, gold corners, central diamond inlay, and the metallic hands gripping the right edge.
description_view_1: The book is seen from an angle, highlighting the sculpted hands gripping the cover and the thickness of the pages.
description_view_2: The side view displays the thick, slightly uneven pages and the metallic hand wrapping around the edge.
description_view_3: The back and top of the book are visible, showing the plain black cover with gold corners and the hands extending over the front.
attribute_cover_illustration: No illustration visible. The cover features a central diamond-shaped inlay and metallic hands, but no artwork or imagery.
